---
title: "Cristián Navarrete"
subtitle: "DPhil student"
image: img/profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 20em
  links: 
    - icon: envelope
      text: "cristian.navarreteoyanedel@anthro.ox.ac.uk"
include-before-body: 
  - html/translate_button.qmd
  - html/carousel_principal.html
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Sociologist and DPhil in Anthropology student at the University of Oxford. My academic interests lie at the intersection of science, health, and society. I also try to make some decent arguments in social theory and the philosophy of the social sciences.

Theoretically, my work has focused on issues of causality and realism in sociology, while my empirical research has centered on antimicrobial resistance. At Oxford I expect to look at how changes in energy systems and its related activities (water usage and energy) affect population health.

I created this page to share my research, reflections, and career updates. Comments and contact are always welcome. Posts may appear in either Spanish or English, depending on the topic and my mood. If you're interested in any of my papers, feel free to reach out. Working papers are either under-review or developed enough for me to share and discuss :)

------------------------------------------------------------------------
